results.rendered_html:
uttāraṇa a. Transporting or bringing over, conveying; rescuing, delivering.
— ṇaḥ N. of Viṣṇu.
— ṇaṃ
1 The act of landing, delivering or rescuing.
2 Transportation, conveying across.
